steps.title: Set up the mass equation
steps.content:
The mixture's total mass equals the sum of all components. Compound A (30 g) + compound B (45 g) + compound C (x g) = total mixture (135 g).

$$30 + 45 + x = 135$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Combine the known masses:
$$75 + x = 135$$

Subtract 75 from both sides:
$$x = 60$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
